notes: Nicola's six-face arcana die. The WILD face resolves on whether she has Harvest banked.

faces.description: Success ★★. The plant did the work; you just witnessed it.
Partial. Spend 1 Harvest to convert to ★.
Partial. Spend 1 Harvest to convert to ★.
Failure. The frost came in early. +1 Harvest from the pantry.
Wild. Counts as ★ if you have at least 1 Harvest banked; counts as failure otherwise.
